title: Utena, Utena County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Utena, Utena County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Utena is a city in Utena County with a population of 28,000. A city in northeastern Lithuania surrounded by lakes and forests, known for its brewery, the Utena Castle mound, and outdoor recreation opportunities.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
